name: Cosner Park
description: Come play pickleball at Cosner Park in Fredericksburg, VA! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Fawn Lake Community Courts
description: Fawn Lake Community Courts is a place to play pickleball in Spotsylvania, VA. There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Fredericksburg Field House
description: Fredericksburg Field House is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fredericksburg, VA. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Holy Cross Academy
description: Holy Cross Academy is a place to play pickleball in Fredericksburg, VA. There is 1 outdoor court. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The court is private.

name: Kenmore Park
description: Come play pickleball at Kenmore Park in Fredericksburg, VA! There are 5 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Keswick Park
description: Come play pickleball at Keswick Park in Spotsylvania Courthouse, VA! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, lights, and water. The courts are free.

name: Lee's Hill - North Community Center
description: Lee's Hill - North Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Fredericksburg, VA. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are private. Amenities include lights.

name: Lee's Hill -  South Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Lee's Hill - South Community Center in Fredericksburg, VA! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Marshall Center
description: Marshall Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Spotsylvania Courthouse, VA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: Pratt Park
description: Pratt Park is a place to play pickleball in Fredericksburg, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: The Picklr Fredericksburg
description: The Picklr Fredericksburg is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fredericksburg, VA. There are 10 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, trainers or lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, wheelchair accessibility, adaptive programming, and food. Reservations are available.
